title: Principal Investment Banker at ET Money

jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at ET Money
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
